articles.title: Tesla stock surges 5% after Q1 earnings beat, but weak sales and rising competition raise concerns
articles.description: Tesla stock went up after strong earnings in Q1 2026. The company made better profit than expected, which helped boost investor confidence. But sales growth is still slow and competition is rising. Tesla is also planning big spending on AI and robotaxis. These factors make investors both hopeful and worried about Tesla stock’s future performance and growth.

articles.title: The hidden science behind why your rice ends up sticky or mushy
articles.description: Achieving perfect fluffy rice is a science, not just luck. The key lies in understanding starch types, amylose and amylopectin, and their interaction with water. Excessive water causes starch to leach, leading to stickiness. Rinsing rice removes surface starch, while the precise water-to-rice ratio controls internal starch gelation and grain texture for that ideal, distinctively grainy result.

articles.title: The science of a perfect sip and why your high quality coffee might taste bitter
articles.description: Bitterness in coffee is often misunderstood, with caffeine wrongly blamed. New research reveals roasting chemicals like chlorogenic acid and phenylindanes are the primary culprits, not caffeine levels. Controlling brewing temperature is crucial, as excessive heat extracts more bitter compounds, making cold brewing an effective method to minimize harshness and reveal nuanced flavors.

articles.title: West Asia conflict poses challenges to Indian economy via number of channels: RBI’s Malhotra in MPC minutes

articles.title: Why your pillow might be the secret source of your morning neck pain
articles.description: Your pillow significantly impacts neck health, often causing stiffness more than sleeping position. Orthopaedic experts highlight that materials like rubber and latex offer superior support for side-sleepers, unlike soft feather or polyester fillings that sag. Pillow height is also crucial for maintaining a neutral spine, preventing discomfort and pressure. Choose wisely for restorative sleep.

articles.title: The kitchen wrap hack that saves your half-finished paint cans from drying out
articles.description: A common household item can save your leftover paint from becoming unusable. Plastic wrap placed directly on the paint surface before sealing the can creates an extra gasket. This prevents air exposure, stopping the formation of a rubbery skin. This simple technique preserves the paint's moisture and mechanical integrity for future use.

articles.title: Cumulative seizures of potential poll inducements in West Bengal, Tamil Nadu touches Rs 1,072 crore
articles.description: Of the total 127.7-crore cash seizures, over 100 crore crore were in Tamil Nadu and Rs 27.5 crore in West Bengal. Around 39.3 lakh litres of liquor valued at Rs 102.5 crore was seized in West Bengal, as against 1.2 lakh litres worth Rs 3.8 crore in Tamil Nadu. The value of seizewd freebies was higher in Tamil Nadu at Rs 259 crore, as against Rs 178.8 crore in West Bengal.

articles.title: Cash, Liquor, Drugs: EC Seizures Cross Rs 1,000 Crore In Poll-Bound Tamil Nadu And West Bengal
articles.description: The Election Commission of India reported that poll-related seizures in West Bengal and Tamil Nadu have exceeded Rs 1,000 crore during ongoing assembly elections and bypolls. According to the Commission, enforcement agencies have seized inducements worth Rs 1,072.13 crore, including cash, liquor, drugs, precious metals and other freebies allegedly intended to influence voters. Tamil Nadu recorded higher seizures at Rs 599.24 crore, while West Bengal accounted for Rs 472.89 crore. The Commission said extensive monitoring systems have been put in place, including thousands of flying squads and static surveillance teams to ensure compliance with the Model Code of Conduct. It also stressed that citizens and political parties should report violations through the C-Vigil platform to support fair and transparent elections.

articles.title: ‘I am here to testify on budget’: Lutnick dodges Van Hollen’s question on ties with Jeffrey Epstein

The high-stakes hearing saw tense exchanges, with Lutnick deflecting scrutiny by focusing on the budget instead of addressing Epstein links. The controversy comes amid newly released Epstein files fueling bipartisan outrage and demands for accountability.

Students can access their scorecards using registration details and download the result PDF for future reference. In case of discrepancies, they must contact the university’s exam cell and stay updated on revaluation notifications.

articles.title: From US To Israel: Global Leaders Mark One Year Of Pahalgam Terror Attack
articles.description: On the first anniversary of the Pahalgam terror attack, US Ambassador to India Sergio Gor and Israeli Ambassador Reuven Azar paid tribute to the 26 victims and expressed solidarity with India. Gor reaffirmed Washington’s support in the fight against terrorism and extended condolences to the affected families. Azar also remembered the victims in a post on social media, stressing that terrorism has no borders and highlighting Israel’s continued support for India. The remembrance marks a moment of shared grief and global unity against terror following the 2025 attack in Jammu and Kashmir.
